feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: Samsara notes
entry.content:
From the Samsara Seqoia Interview

  • Autonomy accelerates speed of economy (deliveries at night etc)
  • Seems like an unlock that will define a new kind of country - those that are autonomous vs those that aren’t.
    • Removing (physical) labor from the economy equation?
  • Marginal cost of physical services hitting 0
    • Go to market being notable for Samsara and predecessors
  • 3g/4g caused youtube, which drove sending data down - piggy back on it to enable selling video streams
  • What infrastructure is currently being built out as part of the AI boom?
    • Datacenters, energy, what else? Energy is tied up in datacenters, until bubble burst.
  • Compute on edge allows compression, beats big data centers through massive edge capability
  • Emergent usecases in widespread tracking hardware
  • Sense of wanting to modernize the industrial base
  • Software is becoming so easy, people may want to link with hardware to make incredible things happen
entry.summary: notes on various interviews with Sanjit of Samsara
